bit_family_summary.source_emission_note: Preserve as numeric flag bits; 0x80 is observed and 0x40 is runtime-supported by C0 but absent from verified D8 data.
Consumer-backed latch bit; name the mask, not individual gameplay surfaces.
Consumer-backed class bits from C0; keep class values numeric until caller evidence proves labels.
Preserved through C0:5B7B's low-six-bit return path; final gameplay labels remain open.

runtime_anchors.name: Read_CollisionByteAndLatchBit10Coord
runtime_anchors.role: latches $5DA8/$5DAA when the sampled byte has bit 0x10

runtime_anchors.name: Probe_SurfaceMaskCollisionSamples
runtime_anchors.role: converts selected high-collision samples into a six-bit occupancy result and optionally stores raw OR in $5DA4

runtime_anchors.name: Resolve_MovementSurfaceCollision
runtime_anchors.role: returns low six raw collision bits after surface-mode resolution when movement can proceed

runtime_anchors.name: Classify_EntityTerrainCompatibility
runtime_anchors.role: maps raw collision bits 2-3 to an entity metadata permission check

runtime_anchors.name: Per-slot movement cache gate
runtime_anchors.role: caches high collision plus special-surface bit and blocks regular slot movement when nonzero

runtime_anchors.name: High-collision consumers
runtime_anchors.role: use high collision bits as current-position, player/bicycle, pathfinding, movement-script, or teleport obstruction checks

runtime_masks.runtime_role: C0:5769, C0:3C4B, player/bicycle movement, pathfinding, teleport, and movement-script probes treat any selected bit as blocking/high collision.
Per-slot collision caches store and later gate movement on $5DA4 & #$00D0, combining the high collision family with the 0x10 special-surface latch bit.
C0:54C9 stores the raw probed coordinates into $5DA8/$5DAA when this bit is present; player movement later calls C0:7526 with that latched coordinate pair.
C0:5DE7 maps A & #$000C into a three-way permission mask against the entity metadata byte at D5:9589 + mapped_offset + 0x20.
C0:5B7B strips high collision bits before returning a movement/surface modifier byte to the player movement caller.

source_emission_rows.source_emission_note: Emit as 2293 16-byte `map_tile_collision_record` rows; every cell byte is `surface_collision_flags` and all observed values must round-trip.
Emit as 20 exact word-offset tables into `MAP_TILE_COLLISION_DATA`; offsets are 16-byte aligned and `0x0000` is a real record, not null.
These all-zero trailing metatiles are synthesized by `.fts` coverage behavior; they are not extra D8 records.

source_policy: Derived from checked-in D8 pointer and C0 runtime-bit contracts. This records field names, masks, counts, and interpretation boundaries only; it does not commit raw collision records.

summary.low_modifier_boundary: 0x01 and 0x02 are preserved through C0:5B7B's low-six-bit return path, but final human gameplay labels remain open.

title: D8 Collision Subrecord Contracts
